fields.label: PROZESSBESCHREIBUNG
fields.value:
The batter or baked cake is stored under controlled conditions until the following step. Holding time, temperature, and container status are monitored to maintain quality, texture, and product consistency throughout the baking process.

The batter from the previous step is transferred into the designated vessel and mixed until it is visually homogeneous. Gentle movement prevents setting of flour particles and distributes air, sugar, and liquid components evenly before the next operation.

The batter from the previous step is transferred into the designated vessel and mixed until it is visually homogeneous. Gentle movement prevents setting of flour particles and distributes air, sugar, and liquid components evenly before the next operation.
